svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="自治评审回路" id="review-loop"> <mxGraphModel dx="-514" dy="-162" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="980" pageHeight="540" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="GRP" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8fafc;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;fontColor=#1e293b;spacingTop=6;" value="自治多 Agent 评审回路:拆 bucket → 并行审 → 流式修 → 零红色收敛" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="480" width="920" x="30" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="D" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="变更范围" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="140" x="80" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="S" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="拆成约 20 个
窄范围 bucket" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="160" x="290" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="P" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="并行派发约 20 个审查 subagent" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="220" x="540" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="R1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="bucket-1 结果" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="130" x="520" y="170" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="R2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="bucket-2 结果" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="130" x="670" y="170" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="F1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="立即派修复 subagent" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="280" x="520" y="250" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="CHK" parent="1" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="还有 🔴 问题?" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="200" x="560" y="330" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="DONE" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="零红色 · 收敛完成" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="180" x="290" y="340" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="NOTE" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;fontColor=#475569;fontSize=11;" value="分级:🔴 必须清零 · 🟡 尽量清 · 🔵 提示
审查与修复重叠执行(流水线)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="320" x="60" y="260" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E1" edge="1" parent="1" source="D" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#2563eb;" target="S"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E2" edge="1" parent="1" source="S" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#2563eb;" target="P"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E3" edge="1" parent="1" source="P" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#94a3b8;" target="R1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E4" edge="1" parent="1" source="P" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#94a3b8;" target="R2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E5" edge="1" parent="1" source="R1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#64748b;fontSize=10;" target="F1" value="立即"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E6" edge="1" parent="1" source="R2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#2563eb;" target="F1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E7" edge="1" parent="1" source="F1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#2563eb;" target="CHK"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E8" edge="1" parent="1" source="CHK" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#d4a017;fontColor=#64748b;fontSize=10;exitX=1;exitY=0.25;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=1;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="P" value="是 → 再审"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E9" edge="1" parent="1" source="CHK" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=10;" target="DONE" value="否"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
